import urllib.request, json

token = ''$TOKEN''

# Step 1: Get folders
req = urllib.request.Request\(''http://localhost:4000/api/folders?pageSize=5'', headers={''Authorization'': f''Bearer {token}''}\)
resp = urllib.request.urlopen\(req\)
folders = json.loads\(resp.read\(\)\)[''data''][''data'']
print\(f''Step 1: Found {len\(folders\)} folders''\)
folderId = folders[0][''id'']
print\(f''  Using folder: {folderId} - {folders[0].get\(""title"",""""\)}''\)

# Step 2: Get documents in folder
req2 = urllib.request.Request\(f''http://localhost:4000/api/folders/{folderId}/documents'', headers={''Authorization'': f''Bearer {token}''}\)
resp2 = urllib.request.urlopen\(req2\)
docs = json.loads\(resp2.read\(\)\)[''data''][''data'']
print\(f''Step 2: Found {len\(docs\)} documents''\)
if docs:
    docId = docs[0][''id'']
    print\(f''  Using document: {docId} - {docs[0].get\(""name"",""""\)}''\)
else:
    print\(''  No documents in folder''\)
    docId = None
    
# Step 3: Create a person with full address \(city, postalCode, country\)
personData = json.dumps\({
    ''type'': ''PHYSIQUE'',
    ''role'': ''PARTIE_ADVERSE'',
    ''firstName'': ''Jean'',
    ''lastName'': ''Dupont'',
    ''email'': ''jean.dupont@example.com'',
    ''phone'': ''0612345678'',
    ''address'': ''15 Rue de la Paix'',
    ''city'': ''Paris'',
    ''postalCode'': ''75002'',
    ''country'': ''FR''
}\).encode\(\)
req3 = urllib.request.Request\(f''http://localhost:4000/api/folders/{folderId}/persons'', data=personData, headers={''Authorization'': f''Bearer {token}'', ''Content-Type'': ''application/json''}\)
resp3 = urllib.request.urlopen\(req3\)
person = json.loads\(resp3.read\(\)\)[''data'']
personId = person[''id'']
print\(f''Step 3: Person created: {personId}''\)
print\(f''  city={person.get\(""city""\)}, postalCode={person.get\(""postalCode""\)}, country={person.get\(""country""\)}''\)
")

Bash(__NEW_LINE_1fa3a50f611b851e__ python3 -c "
import urllib.request, json

token = ''$TOKEN''

# Get folders - check response structure
req = urllib.request.Request\(''http://localhost:4000/api/folders?pageSize=5'', headers={''Authorization'': f''Bearer {token}''}\)
resp = urllib.request.urlopen\(req\)
body = json.loads\(resp.read\(\)\)
print\(''Folders response keys:'', list\(body.keys\(\)\)\)
print\(''data keys:'', list\(body[''data''].keys\(\)\) if isinstance\(body[''data''], dict\) else type\(body[''data'']\)\)
data = body[''data'']
if isinstance\(data, dict\) and ''data'' in data:
    folders = data[''data'']
elif isinstance\(data, list\):
    folders = data
else:
    folders = data.get\(''items'', data.get\(''folders'', []\)\)
    
print\(f''Found {len\(folders\)} folders''\)
if folders:
    print\(''First folder keys:'', list\(folders[0].keys\(\)\)\)
    print\(json.dumps\(folders[0], indent=2, default=str\)[:500]\)
")
